_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of request for information processes
reference_document_element_description: Process data access requests per defined procedures, including request validation, approval routing, provisioning, and access log documentation.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Task DG-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.502), DA-K-016 (DA, cosine: 0.492).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.545). Shared vocabulary: [request]. NICE-only terms [information, knowledge, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, approval, data, defined, documentation, log] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.876, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of request for information processes" and "Process data access requests per defined procedures, including request validatio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.526 ≈ STS 0.545 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [request] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [request]. NICE-only: [information, knowledge, processes]. WIDAI-only: [access, approval, data, defined, documentation, log].
